facts.notes: PASS: lion pose, upward roaring muzzle, golden mane, pink limbs, no human figure, green ground, pale left cloud column, diagonal fields, upper-left picture Leo emblem, upper-right Moebius tube, and talisman disk are faithful; drama/pride/showmanship mood preserved.
